summary: The stock LLY has multiple bearish factors, including being below its 20-day moving average and 50-day moving average, weak momentum, and negative return momentum over both 5-day and 20-day periods.
bearish_factors: Price is below the 20-day moving average.
The 20-day moving average is below the 50-day moving average.
The 12-day EMA is below the 26-day EMA, suggesting weak momentum.
MACD is below its signal line, indicating weakening momentum.
The stock has negative 5-day return momentum.
The stock has negative 20-day return momentum.
